parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT store_name FROM rag_stores WHERE store_type = 'base' LIMIT 1) as base_store,
  (SELECT store_name FROM rag_stores WHERE store_type = 'session' AND session_id = '{{ $json.session_id }}' LIMIT 1) as session_store,
  (SELECT json_agg(h) FROM (SELECT question, answer FROM chat_history WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.session_id }}' AND answer IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20) h) as historial

INSERT INTO chat_history (id, session_id, request_id, question, answer, created_at)
VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid(),
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  gen_random_uuid(),
  '{{ $json.pregunta.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.respuesta.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
)
